# [hypr-wallpicker](https://github.com/Horizon0427/hypr-wallpicker) 

Discussion Type

General

### Discussion Content

# Welcome to hypr-wallpicker Discussions

This is the place for general questions, workflow ideas, backend integration notes, and feature brainstorming for **hypr-wallpicker**.

The project is currently focused on:

- refactoring the codebase into a cleaner modular C layout
- keeping the core lightweight and portable
- improving sane defaults for both Wayland and X11
- eventually supporting cleaner config-driven desktop integration

Use Discussions for:
- setup questions
- compositor / WM compatibility notes
- hook script examples
- design feedback
- brainstorming around backend-aware defaults and config direction

Use Issues for:
- reproducible bugs
- concrete feature requests
- docs problems

Right now We're especially interested in feedback around:
- Wayland vs X11 default behavior
- Hyprland / i3 first-run expectations
- apply hook design
- config/preset structure

If you’re using it, feel free to share your setup and workflow.
